hero_title: Preserve Audit Evidence for PEP Screening
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams document and maintain an auditable trail of PEP screening decisions by linking provider outputs with case management and regulatory workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens without connected evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve a clear audit trail linking PEP screening results with review decisions. This fragmentation creates challenges in reconstructing case history and responding to regulatory audits efficiently.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects PEP screening outputs, reviewer actions, decision logs and case evidence into one workflow so compliance teams maintain a seamless and audit-ready record for regulatory review.
workflow_title: From screening hits to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes screening results into structured reviews that create cases, record decisions, preserve audit evidence and prepare regulatory reports for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects screening outputs into structured workflows, preserving audit evidence and decision history for clearer, defensible PEP compliance within digital asset businesses.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with controlled provider orchestration and audit-ready evidence to maintain defensible records and meet bank due diligence demands.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected layer to connect screening outputs, apply policies, manage cases, record decisions and preserve audit-ready evidence in one operational workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage PEP screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures PEP screening into reviewable alerts, supports case creation, routes workflows for escalation and links decisions with supporting evidence and regulatory rule updates.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence by recording decision logs, case history and provider outputs with controlled access and traceable review history for PEP screening compliance.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers to connect their results without disrupting current compliance systems or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions or PEP providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace sanctions or PEP screening providers but turns their outputs into structured compliance cases, evidence and reports within a controlled workflow.
final_title: Preserve audit evidence for PEP screening
final_description: Review how SFTY connects PEP screening outputs into structured cases, decision logs and audit-ready compliance evidence.
